ADMIN_NOTIFICATIONS.CUSTOM_INTERVAL_SET_FAILURE: Oops, your custom interval of {refreshInterval} minutes must be between {refreshIntervalMinimum} and {refreshIntervalMaximum} minutes. Please try again.
ADMIN_NOTIFICATIONS.PAGE_REFRESHED_FAILURE: There was an issue refreshing your page. Please try again.
ADMIN_NOTIFICATIONS.PAGE_REFRESHED_SUCCESS: You've successfully refreshed your page. All connected browsers will refresh within {refreshIntervalValue} {refreshIntervalUnit}.
ADMIN_NOTIFICATIONS.SCHEDULED_REFRESH_FAILURE: There was an issue scheduling your refresh. Please try again.
ADMIN_NOTIFICATIONS.SCHEDULED_REFRESH_DELETE_SUCCESS: You've successfully deleted your scheduled refresh.
ADMIN_NOTIFICATIONS.SCHEDULED_REFRESH_DELETE_FAILURE: There was an issue deleting your scheduled your refresh. Please try again.
ADMIN_NOTIFICATIONS.SITE_DEBUG_MODE_FAILURE: There was an issue updating settings for debug mode. Please try again.
ADMIN_NOTIFICATIONS.SITE_REFRESHED_FAILURE: There was an issue refreshing your site. Please try again.
ADMIN_NOTIFICATIONS.SITE_REFRESHED_SUCCESS: You've successfully refreshed your site. All connected browsers will refresh within {refreshIntervalValue} {refreshIntervalUnit}.
ADMIN_NOTIFICATIONS.SITE_SETTINGS_UPDATED_FAILURE: There was an issue updating your settings. Please try again.
ADMIN_NOTIFICATIONS.SITE_SETTINGS_UPDATED_SUCCESS: You've successfully updated settings for Force Refresh.

ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODE_DESCRIPTION_ACTIVE: Debugging mode is currently turned on. This means that Force Refresh will not refresh connected browsers.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODE_DESCRIPTION_INACTIVE: Debugging mode is currently turned off. This means that Force Refresh will operate normally.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.SUBMIT_DEBUG_LABEL: Have an open support ticket? Submit your debug information to help diagnose the problem.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODAL_NOTE: Only the following diagnostic data will be included. {email} will be CC'd on this report.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODAL_NOTE_NO_EMAIL: Only the following diagnostic data will be included.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODAL_SUPPORT_URL_DESCRIPTION: Paste the URL for your WordPress.org support topic.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODAL_SUPPORT_URL_REQUIRED: Please enter your WordPress.org support topic URL before sending the report.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODAL_SUPPORT_URL_INVALID: Please enter a valid WordPress.org support topic URL.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODAL_SUPPORT_URL_NOT_FOUND: That support topic could not be found. Please check the URL and try again.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODAL_SUPPORT_URL_RESOLVED: That support topic is already marked resolved. Please create another one and try again.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODAL_SUPPORT_URL_UNAVAILABLE: That support topic could not be found right now. Please try again later.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODAL_SUPPORT_URL_UNCONFIRMED: That support topic could not be verified right now. Please try again later.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODAL_SENT_SUBTITLE: Thank you! Your report has been received and we'll follow up in the support thread.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODAL_SEND_FAILED: The debug report could not be sent. Please try again.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.DEBUG_MODAL_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.TROUBLESHOOTING_VERSION_IS_DEVELOPMENT_V: Your version of {label} is an unsupported development version.
ADMIN_TROUBLESHOOTING.TROUBLESHOOTING_VERSION_IS_OUTDATED: Your version of {label} is outdated. Please update to version {versionRequired}.

ADMIN_REFRESH_MAIN.PLUGIN_BADGE_DEBUG_MODE_TOOLTIP: Debug mode is active. Force Refresh will log to the browser console and will not refresh connected browsers.
ADMIN_REFRESH_MAIN.PLUGIN_BADGE_PRE_RELEASE_TOOLTIP: You're running a pre-release version ({installedVersion}). This build is intended for debugging only.
ADMIN_REFRESH_MAIN.PLUGIN_BADGE_OUTDATED_TOOLTIP: Your installed version ({installedVersion}) is outdated. Click to visit the Plugins page.
ADMIN_REFRESH_MAIN.REFRESH_DIRECTIONS: Here, you can force all currently-connected users to manually reload the site "{siteName}".
ADMIN_REFRESH_MAIN.REFRESH_DIRECTIONS_NO_SITE_NAME: Here, you can force all currently-connected users to manually reload this site.

RELEASE_NOTES.RELEASE_NOTES_UNAVAILABLE: I'm sorry, but release notes are currently unavailable. Please visit Force Refresh's plugin page to view the full changelog.

SCHEDULE_REFRESH.DESCRIPTION: Please select the date and time you'd like to schedule a refresh.
